extra.reason: Implemented SPEC-70.01 Beads doctor baseline with read-only Beads health detection, dp doctor JSON/text output, task_health enforcement replacing bd sync, updated docs and progress bootstrap guidance, and follow-up M7 backlog. Verified with dp doctor --json, trace validate/coverage, focused tests, lint, mypy, and UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache make check.

Moved jsonschema into runtime dependencies, refreshed uv.lock, reinstalled dp-codex as an editable uv tool, and verified dp resolves from /Users/rand/.local/bin, dp --help works outside the repo, dp doctor --json works in the repo, and UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache make check passes.

Implemented deterministic GoalContract lint with stable JSON and exit codes, golden fixtures, reference docs, SPEC-80.01, and ADR boundaries. Verified with dp goal lint tests/fixtures/goals/valid_spec_70_01.json --json, pytest tests/test_goal_lint.py tests/test_goal_state.py tests/test_goal_emit.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, and dp trace coverage --json.

Implemented append-only goal lifecycle state commands for status, claim, start, heartbeat, block, release, and evidence-pending complete over .dp/goals/events.jsonl. Verified with pytest tests/test_goal_state.py and make check.

Implemented Codex-operable goal emission via dp goal emit and dp agent prompt over valid GoalContracts, including lifecycle commands and evidence/no-self-report instructions. Verified with dp goal emit tests/fixtures/goals/valid_spec_70_01.json --format codex --json, pytest tests/test_goal_emit.py, and make check.

Updated README and documentation indexes/references for current SPEC-80 goal surfaces; added goal workflow runbook; clarified future campaign/evidence/runner work as not yet implemented; added goal-lint schema validation coverage. Verified with pytest tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Reframed README goal handoff examples around adopting repositories and moved the dp-codex SPEC-70.01 fixture into contributor smoke-test wording. Verified with make check, dp trace validate --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented deterministic EvidencePlan lint via dp evidence lint with documented schema, stable JSON and exit semantics, registered argv validation, timeout/success-code/assertion/mutation-policy checks, raw-shell rejection in argv entries, golden fixtures, output schema tests, README/runbook/reference/spec updates. Verified with dp evidence lint tests/fixtures/evidence/valid_spec_80_05.json --json, pytest tests/test_evidence_lint.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented deterministic LoopLedger lint/status/next with documented SPEC-80.04 schema, stable loop-lint JSON schema, acyclic dependency validation, valid GoalContract references, blocked and claimed node skipping, verified-event dependency unlocks, claim leases through existing goal events, and Codex package emission. Verified with dp loop lint tests/fixtures/loops/valid_spec_80_04.json --json, dp loop status tests/fixtures/loops/valid_spec_80_04.json --json, pytest tests/test_loop_ledger.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented SPEC-70.07 Beads version-aware capability detection. dp doctor now parses bd version, does not run bd sync --help for Beads 1.0+ where sync is known removed, reports sync_command_available=false without stale warnings for current versions, and preserves sync probing for older or unparseable versions. Verified with pytest tests/unit/test_beads_provider.py tests/unit/test_cli_task.py, dp doctor --json, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.06 CampaignManifest lint/status/recover with schema docs, golden fixtures, CLI tests, schema validation, deterministic artifact closure, read-only status/recover, and verified via targeted tests, make check, trace validation/coverage, and dp verify.

Implemented SPEC-80.07 conservative primary-spec campaign scaffold. dp campaign init --primary-spec <path> --write --json now hashes a local primary spec, extracts Markdown headings, writes draft CampaignManifest/LoopLedger/GoalContract/EvidencePlan artifacts plus needs_refinement markers, refuses changed-artifact overwrites, and lints generated artifacts without LLM calls, Beads writes, evidence execution, or semantic planning. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_init.py tests/test_campaign_manifest.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, temp-dir scaffold smoke, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, and dp verify.

Implemented SPEC-80.08 controlled evidence executor. Added SPEC, ADR update, stable evidence-run JSON schema, dp evidence run CLI, argv-only shell=False execution behind deterministic lint, controlled cwd/env, declared timeouts, typed assertions, denial fixtures, success/failure fixtures, schema tests, README/reference/runbook updates. Verified with dp evidence run tests/fixtures/evidence/valid_run_goal_lint.json --json, pytest tests/test_evidence_run.py tests/test_evidence_lint.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, dp verify, dp doctor, and bd --readonly status.

Implemented SPEC-80.10 evidence verification into goal state. Added docs/specs/SPEC-80-10-evidence-verification.md, dp goal verify, evidence-run provenance hashing, stable evidence-run schema updates, loop/goal emitted verify commands, docs and README updates, and tests covering passing evidence, failed evidence, mismatched goal id, stale EvidencePlan hash, missing run artifact, and self-report non-proof. Verified with targeted pytest, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, dp doctor --json, and bd --readonly status --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.09 deterministic primary-spec semantic signals. Added SPEC-80.09 contract and formal invariants; dp campaign init now emits a stable compiler object with deterministic Markdown signal extraction, no-LLM flags, node classifications, refinement states, signal cues, and summary counts. Generated campaign, loop, goal, and needs_refinement artifacts carry compiler provenance while remaining draft and without inferred dependency edges, Beads writes, evidence execution, or LLM calls. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_init.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.11 deterministic campaign refine and Beads materialization. Added docs/specs/SPEC-80-11-campaign-refine-and-beads-materialization.md, dp campaign refine dry-run/write/create-beads/llm-fail-closed command surface, deterministic child spec/ADR materialization, GoalContract and EvidencePlan refinement metadata, calling-agent LLM provenance contract, campaign-refine JSON schema, docs/README updates, and tests. Verified with targeted pytest, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.12 agent-mediated LLM refinement protocol. Added dp campaign refine --llm request emission for the calling agent provider, --llm-response import with prompt-hash binding and deterministic validation, LLM provenance recording, draft campaign/goal/evidence refinement metadata import, raw-shell evidence denial, response/output schemas, spec/docs/README updates, and tests for request emission, valid import, unknown goal rejection, raw shell rejection, and schema validation. Verified with targeted pytest, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.13 supervised campaign run step: dp campaign run --driver codex --supervised validates campaign state, resolves the current loop, claims one ready goal through loop.next, emits a Codex handoff package, and stops without launching agents or executing evidence. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_run.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, trace validate/coverage, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp doctor --json, and bd --readonly status --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.14 deterministic blocker artifact routing. Added SPEC/ADR, dp goal block --write-artifact, deterministic spec/ADR/EvidencePlan route artifacts, optional Beads follow-up creation with explicit failure metadata, routed blocker event reconstruction, Codex/loop handoff block commands, docs/README updates, and tests for artifact creation, mocked Beads success/failure, missing routes, and collision safety. Verified with pytest tests/test_goal_block_routing.py tests/test_goal_state.py tests/test_goal_emit.py tests/test_loop_ledger.py, make test/lint/typecheck/check with UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache, dp doctor --json, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.15 campaign events and resume handoff. Added SPEC/ADR, append-only .dp/campaigns/events.jsonl handoff events, deterministic campaign status/recover resume packages, stale-claim reporting, blocker/evidence-pending/ready/verified resume actions, and supervised campaign run behavior that resumes active claims instead of claiming over them. Updated README, reference docs, runbook, schema, and SPEC-80 status. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_recovery.py tests/test_campaign_manifest.py tests/test_campaign_run.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test/lint/typecheck/check with UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache, dp doctor --json, bd --readonly status --json, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.17 evidence run artifacts and goal verification orchestration. dp evidence run now supports safe --output/--force artifact writes, dp verify --goal orchestrates goal lint, evidence lint, generated or supplied evidence artifacts, trace/provenance summary, and deterministic goal verification, and Codex/loop/campaign handoffs now include concrete evidence paths and exact evidence/complete/verify commands. Verified with targeted pytest, schema tests, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, dp verify, and dp doctor.

Implemented SPEC-80.19 end-to-end Field Report CLI campaign pilot. Added a non-dp primary spec fixture, isolated pytest pilot that runs campaign init/refine with simulated Beads materialization, supervised campaign handoff, dp verify --goal evidence artifact verification, blocker routing, recovery, and stable JSON/Markdown pilot summaries. Updated README and added docs/runbooks/campaign-pilot.md. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_pilot.py and adjacent campaign tests, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, dp verify, and dp doctor.
